provenance.name: Can the business afford this action?
What is driving profit and cash?
Which receivable or payable needs action?
Are the books complete and controlled?
Finance Accounts receivable and invoicing API
Finance Accounts payable and bills API
Finance Financial statements and close API

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Every posted journal balances debits and credits in one currency basis.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Posted entries are immutable; corrections use reversal and replacement.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Closed periods reject posting unless reopened by authorized control.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Money uses decimal arithmetic and explicit currency.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Invoice totals equal validated line, tax, discount, and rounding components.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Payments cannot exceed permitted open amount without an explicit credit policy.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Reconciliation records source, match method, actor, and difference.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Forecasts disclose assumptions, horizon, interval, and model version.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.
